session.user:
Run `make fast-ci` in `/home/runner/work/erk/erk` and report ALL results. I need to know: 1. Whether each check passed or failed (ruff lint, ruff format, prettier, md-check, ty, pytest, exec-reference-check, sync-kit) 2. If any tests failed, list every failing test name with the error message 3. The total test count and pass/fail summary
This is READ-ONLY. Do not modify any files. Just run the command and report results.
session.assistant: I'll run `make fast-ci` and report all results.

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: Run fast-ci target and report all results

session.tool_result:
=== Fast CI ===
--- Lint --- All checks passed!
--- Format Check --- 1693 files already formatted
--- Prettier Check --- Checking formatting... All matched files use Prettier code style!
--- Markdown Check ---
--- Exec Reference Check --- OK: .claude/skills/erk-exec/reference.md is up to date
--- ty --- All checks passed!
--- Unit Tests (erk) --- bringing up nodes... bringing up nodes...

[ 2%] ........................................................................ [ 3%] ........................................................................ [ 4%] ........................................................................ [ 6%] ........................................................................ [ 7%]
... [111 lines omitted] ...
=============================== warnings summary =============================== /home/runner/work/erk/erk/tests/unit/cli/test_json_command.py:16: DeprecationWarning: 'BaseCommand' is deprecated and will be removed in Click 9.0. Use 'Command' instead. -- Docs: https://docs.pytest.org/en/stable/how-to/capture-warnings.html 5994 passed, 2 warnings in 15.55s
session.assistant:
## make fast-ci Results
**All checks PASSED**
### Individual Check Results
| Check | Status | |-------|--------| | Lint (ruff) | PASSED | | Format Check (ruff) | PASSED - 1693 files already formatted | | Prettier Check | PASSED - All matched files use Prettier code style | | Markdown Check | PASSED | | Exec Reference Check | PASSED - reference.md is up to date | | ty (type checking) | PASSED | | Unit Tests (erk) | PASSED | | Tests (erk-dev) | PASSED | | Tests (erk-statusline) | PASSED | | Tests (erk-mcp) | PASSED |
### Test Summary
**Total Test Results:** - **erk unit tests**: 5994 passed, 2 warnings - **erk-dev tests**: 136 passed - **erk-statusline tests**: 115 passed - **erk-mcp tests**: All passed - **Total**: 6245 tests passed
**Warnings (non-critical):** - DeprecationWarning in `tests/unit/cli/test_json_command.py::test_output_types_matches_return_annotation` - 'BaseCommand' is deprecated and will be removed in Click 9.0
**Additional validation:** - AGENTS.md standard: PASSED - CLAUDE.md/AGENTS.md pairing: 19 files checked, 0 violations
No failing tests. The entire fast-ci suite passed successfully.
